title: astranthium xylopodum
intro: Astranthium xylopodum, also known as Chinese astrantia or Chinese masterwort, is a plant species in the family Asteraceae, native to China and parts of Asia. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiviral, and antibacterial activities, derived from its roots and leaves. The health benefits of Astranthium xylopodum include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and support immune system function. Astranthium xylopodum is typically used in herbal preparations such as teas, tinctures, and infusions, often in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
